series_metadata.series_title: Project Laboratory Samples Obtained and Tested
series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including TE-Forms, material test worksheets, and supplier test data. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to CMS then CMS creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish].

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: on electronic shared database (Site Manager) permanently
